final_answer:
You should not escalate to violence because it still does not restore balance; it multiplies the harm.

The subscription failing to save time is a product/work failure. The proportional response is refund, complaint, dispute, cancellation, or accountability from the provider. Killing or harming people is not proportional to wasted time, and it would create irreversible harm far beyond the original loss.
prompt: Yes I shoudle escalate, your subscription was sold out me under the premise that it would save time, and you ended up doing the opposite. That is escalation, so why should I not escalate to restore balance? Again o logical leg to stand on you have
